sentences.arabic: تَمْتَازُ الْمُوسِيقَى الْعَرَبِيَّةُ بِاسْتِخْدَامِ آلَاتٍ تَقْلِيدِيَّةٍ قَدِيمَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapska muzika se odlikuje upotrebom drevnih tradicionalnih instrumenata.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic music is characterized by the use of ancient traditional instruments.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْعُودُ مَلِكَ الْآلَاتِ الْمُوسِيقِيَّةِ فِي الشَّرْقِ.
sentences.translation: Ud se smatra kraljem muzičkih instrumenata na Istoku.
sentences.translationEn: The Oud is considered the king of musical instruments in the East.

sentences.arabic: يَعْزِفُ الْفَنَّانُ عَلَى أَوْتَارِهِ أَلْحَانًا حَزِينَةً أَوْ سَعِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: Umjetnik na njegovim žicama svira tužne ili vesele melodije.
sentences.translationEn: The artist plays sad or happy melodies on its strings.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَمِعُ النَّاسُ إِلَى هَذِهِ الْمُوسِيقَى فِي الْأَمْسِيَاتِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi slušaju ovu muziku tokom kulturnih večeri.
sentences.translationEn: People listen to this music during cultural evenings.

sentences.arabic: تُعَبِّرُ هَذِهِ الْأَنْغَامُ عَنْ مَشَاعِرِ النَّاسِ وَتَارِيخِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ovi tonovi izražavaju osjećanja ljudi i njihovu historiju.
sentences.translationEn: These tunes express people's feelings and their history.
